rationale: Educ. Code §21.034 governs board member terms and vacancies for an education board. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 21.034. TERMS; VACANCY. (a) The board members appointed by the governor hold office for staggered terms of six years with the terms of one-third of the members expiring on February 1 of each odd-numbered year.
_note: No conflict: rule_text concerns board member appointments and vacancies, not homestead exemptions or property tax.
